title: Airport Selector Update
goal: Ensure customers are only shown relevant terminals (duty-free or duty-paid) based on the site they are on, improving routing accuracy, reducing confusion, and increasing conversion across Brazil’s digital channels.
description: Customers currently see a mixed list of domestic and international terminals regardless of context, leading to confusion, pricing mistrust, and misaligned journeys. This initiative introduces a business-line-aware airport selector that restricts terminal visibility to only valid options (duty-free or duty-paid), ensuring consistent pricing perception, clearer user journeys, and improved performance across Paid Media, CRM, SEO, and on-site conversion funnels.
